name: Senior Citizen Social Support Directory (Sample Record)
description: Sample record for older adults seeking current social-support programme information.

benefit.description: Benefits depend on current central and state programme rules.

other_conditions: Programme eligibility varies by state and income criteria.

application.portal: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

ai_explanation.summary: This sample is relevant to people aged 60 or above seeking official support information.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Review current central and state programme rules.
common_rejection_reasons: Age or income criteria not met

source.organization: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

name: Senior Citizen Health Coverage Guidance (Sample Record)
description: Sample record for senior citizens seeking current official health-coverage guidance.

benefit.description: Use the official PM-JAY portal to confirm current coverage.

other_conditions: Coverage is subject to official eligibility verification.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample directs senior citizens to verify current health coverage through the official portal.
tips: Keep age and identity details consistent.
